ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "days_to_t0" INTEGER /* Days since the baseline date */,
  "S" REAL /* Susceptible population */,
  "E" REAL /* Exposed population */,
  "I1" REAL /* Infected population I1 */,
  "I2" REAL /* Infected population I2 */,
  "I3" REAL /* Infected population I3 */,
  "R" REAL /* Recovered population */,
  "D" REAL /* Deaths reported */,
  "cumulative_I1" REAL /* Cumulative infections I1 */,
  "cumulative_I2_I3" REAL /* Cumulative infections I2 and I3 */,
  "I1_increase" REAL /* Increase in I1 infections since last report */,
  "hosp_increase" REAL /* Increase in hospitalizations since last report */,
  "D_increase" REAL /* Increase in deaths since last report */,
  "I1_tested" REAL /* Total I1 tested */,
  "I1_increase_tested" REAL /* Increase in I1 tested since last report */,
  "cumulative_I1_tested" REAL /* Cumulative I1 tested */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease being reported */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the report is being generated */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the testing center */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the testing center */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the testing center */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the testing center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_reports" (
  "hospital_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital report */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital providing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding daily report */,
  "patients_reported" INTEGER /* Number of patients reported by the hospital */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations reported */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "admissions" INTEGER /* Number of hospital admissions reported */,
  "discharges" INTEGER /* Number of hospital discharges reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_reports_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_reports_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_reports" (
  "testing_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing report */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing center submitting the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding daily report */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases reported */,
  "negative_cases" INTEGER /* Number of negative cases reported */,
  "num_tests_pending" INTEGER /* Number of tests pending results */,
  "num_tests_invalid" INTEGER /* Number of tests with invalid results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_reports_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_reports_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES testing_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_types" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the disease (e.g., infectious, viral, bacterial) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms associated with the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., daily report, weekly report) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the report is generated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view report, submit data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device, etc.) used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cumulative_stats" (
  "cumulative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for cumulative statistics entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the cumulative data */,
  "total_infections" INTEGER /* Total number of infections recorded */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cumulative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cumulative_stats_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES daily_reports ("date")
)
